title: Utils
description: Modern JavaScript utilities for the real world, featuring go-style error handling, modern data structure support, and battle-tested solutions for production applications.

title: Fetch
description: Modern HTTP client built on the Fetch API for the real world, providing production-ready features like retry logic and request cancellation.

title: Observer
description: Advanced event-driven architecture library that goes beyond simple event emission, providing type-safe events, event promises, generators, validation, and comprehensive debugging tools.

title: StateMachine
description: Stream-based state management with forward/backward navigation, reducer support, change listeners, and child instance cloning for complex application state management.

title: Localize
description: Type-safe localization manager for managing translations, switching languages at runtime, and handling dynamic values in internationalized applications.

title: Storage
description: Type-safe browser storage adapter with key prefixing, event handling, and convenient methods for managing localStorage and sessionStorage with enhanced functionality.

title: Kit
description: Comprehensive library that combines all LogosDX packages into one streamlined toolkit, providing strong typing capabilities and enhanced development experience for both small and large-scale projects.

title: DOM
description: DOM utilities that extend your programming abilities with time-saving tools for DOM manipulation, event handling, and attribute management.
